title: PJM Wind Generation By Area CSV download
description:
Wind generation by Area in PJM on an hourly basis. Areas include *MIDATL*,
*Other*, *RFC*, *RTO*, *South*, and *West*. The *Other* region contains
external units as well as units for which the region/area is unknown.

⚠️ Not all Areas are present across the historical data. Null values
represent records in which an Area did not exist.
